$pipelineDocs.$comment: The pipeline array above DRIVES the generation order — rearrange its entries to reorder the stages. plateauTerracing / metalDepositPads / watersEdgeShoreline may be shuffled freely among themselves; naturalField, mapBoundary, gradientEstimate are pinned to the front (they build the shaped surface and its slope) and floorClamp is pinned to the end. Boot fails loudly on any other arrangement.
$pipelineDocs.naturalField: Radial cosine mountain ripple (CENTER bar) plus team-count divider ridges (DIVIDERS bar), faded to flat before the outer map buffer (generation.edgeFadeWidthFraction). Creates the height field.
$pipelineDocs.mapBoundary: PERIMETER bar override: from generation.perimeter.innerRadiusFraction the height cosine-blends toward the signed perimeter magnitude, hard at outerRadiusFraction (negative = round island below water, positive = rim wall). Stages 1-2 form the 'shaped' surface every later stage references.
$pipelineDocs.gradientEstimate: Finite-difference slope magnitude of the shaped surface. Feeds plateau shelf sizing, waters-edge wall shelf sizing, and the shore-distance estimate |shaped - waterLevel| / gradient that both shoreline fades use.
$pipelineDocs.plateauTerracing: D-PLATEAU bar snap: heights terrace onto the TERRAIN_D_TERRAIN lattice; shelf width from generation.plateau.shelfFractionOfStep, walls at the PLATEAU WALL bar slope via the shared ramp curve. Walls are closed-loop WALL TRIS regions.
$pipelineDocs.metalDepositPads: Per-deposit circular flat pads (flatPadCells, null = auto-sized to the resource footprint) at their resolved heights, raised-cosine blending back over each ring's terrainBlendRadius.
$pipelineDocs.watersEdgeShoreline: Team-periodic beach/cliff halves per player slice (beach centered on the player spoke at the BEACH SLOPE bar, 0 = flat shelf at water level; cliff centered on the divider at the W-CLIFF bar height) joined by wall-steep end caps from the PLATEAU WALL slope. Both operators apply fully at the waterline and raised-cosine fade to no effect over generation.shoreline.beachFadeRadius / cliffFadeRadius of horizontal shore distance, following the water's curves on both sides. Cliff wall/cap regions are closed-loop WALL TRIS; far from water they are flattened, not removed.
$pipelineDocs.floorClamp: max(world.floorY, height) — nothing generates below the world floor. The water plane sits at floorY * (1 - water.levelFraction).
